narrative:
Monroe 5 (precinct in Butler County) has 824 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
